about.title: About ParkMark
about.description: ParkMark is a smart parking assistant that helps you remember where you parked your car. Save your parking location with GPS precision, add photos and notes, and set reminders so you never forget where your car is.
about.feature2: Add photos to remember the spot

privacy.intro: ParkMark ('we', 'us', or 'our') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our mobile application.
privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, and parking data (location coordinates, photos, notes, floor, section). We also collect device information and usage analytics to improve the app.
privacy.section2Body: We use your information to provide the parking reminder service, save and display your parking history, send push notifications (when enabled), and improve app performance and user experience.
privacy.section3Body: ParkMark requires location access to save your parking coordinates. Location data is stored on our servers and linked to your account. We do not share precise location data with third parties.
privacy.section4Body: Photos you take within the app are uploaded to secure cloud storage. You can delete your photos at any time by removing the parking record. We do not use your photos for any purpose other than displaying them to you.
privacy.section5Body: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption for all data transmission and secure storage for your account credentials. Your data is never sold to third parties.
privacy.section6Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can delete your account and all associated data by contacting us. You may also opt out of analytics by disabling it in your device settings.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at:

terms.intro: By downloading or using ParkMark, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using the application.
terms.section1Body: By accessing or using ParkMark, you confirm that you are at least 13 years old and agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the application.
terms.section2Body: ParkMark is provided for personal, non-commercial use. You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to access other users' data, reverse engineer the application, or use it for any unlawful purpose.
terms.section3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password. ParkMark is not liable for any loss or damage resulting from unauthorized access to your account.
terms.section4Body: ParkMark is a tool to help you remember your parking location. We are not responsible for parking fines, towing, lost or stolen vehicles, or any other consequence related to your parking decisions.
terms.section5Body: Premium subscriptions are billed through the App Store or Google Play. Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the renewal date. Refunds are subject to the respective platform' s refund policy.
terms.section6Body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of ParkMark after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms. We will notify users of significant changes via in-app notification or email.
terms.section7Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. You may also delete your account at any time by contacting support.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:
